generation.image_prompt: Mystical 1900s lithography tarot card illustration. Vintage woodcut texture, limited earthy color palette. Clean bold black ink outlines. NO BORDERS. FULL BLEED IMAGE. WIDE FIELD OF VIEW. ANTHROPOMORPHIC: One Taiwan leopard cat STRICTLY STANDING UPRIGHT ON TWO LEGS on a high rocky ledge, holding one wooden wand FIRMLY WITH BOTH PAWS. Six other wands poke up from below as if trying to reach the cat. The cat looks down with determination. Slender and agile feline build. High-fidelity biological markers: narrow small-cat facial structure, distinct white stripes from nose to forehead, white muzzle, and large white spots behind black ears. No baked-in text.
generation.narrative: A leopard cat defends the last core habitat patch from external pressures, representing the vital educational need to protect the 'pristine baseline'.

meanings.upright: Defensiveness, resilience, protecting the core, standing one's ground against encroachment.
meanings.reversed: Feeling overwhelmed, giving up habitat, or a failure to defend the essential core.

ecology.risk_theme: the struggle to hold shrinking habitat patches
ecology.mapping_note: Seven of Wands represents the 'Boundary Defense'—the vital need to protect the few remaining safe core zones (Ecological Core) from constant external human and invasive pressure.
ecology.zh: 棲地樣貌：contested territory boundary 。 生存威脅：the struggle to hold shrinking habitat patches 。 牌義關聯：Seven of Wands represents the 'Boundary Defense'—the vital need to protect the few remaining safe core zones (Ecological Core) from constant external human and invasive pressure. 。 石虎特徵：台灣石虎 。 生命階段：成年

website.excerpt: Standing firm against the tide of encroachment, the leopard cat defends the sanctity of the core habitat.
website.seo_description: Seven of Wands reimagined as leopard cat boundary defense and habitat protection.

meaning.zh: 守護、韌性、保護核心棲地，以及在外部壓力下堅守陣地。
meaning.en: Defensiveness, resilience, protecting the core, standing one's ground against encroachment.
